failures.name: FalconSat
failures.failureSummary: Engine fire during first Falcon 1 launch led to mission failure.

failures.name: DemoSat
failures.failureSummary: Second Falcon 1 launch failed before reaching orbit.

failures.name: Trailblazer
failures.failureSummary: Residual thrust caused stage recontact after separation, leading to mission loss.

failures.name: CRS-1
failures.failureSummary: Primary Dragon cargo mission succeeded, but a secondary payload did not reach its intended orbit.

failures.name: CRS-7
failures.failureSummary: Falcon 9 broke up in flight during the CRS-7 mission.

failures.name: Amos-6
failures.failureSummary: Vehicle destroyed during propellant loading for a planned static fire

failures.name: Starlink 3-1 (v1.5)
failures.failureSummary: Satellites failed to reach operational orbit due to geomagnetic storm

failures.name: Starship Flight 1
failures.failureSummary: Vehicle lost control after multiple engine failures; Autonomous Flight Termination System (AFTS) activated at T+4min. Both booster and ship destroyed.

failures.name: Starship Flight 2
failures.failureSummary: Booster exploded during boostback burn. Ship reached space but AFTS destroyed it during coast phase.

failures.name: Starship Flight 3
failures.failureSummary: Reached space and near-orbital velocity. Ship lost during reentry over Indian Ocean. Booster lost during landing burn over Gulf of Mexico.

failures.name: Starlink Group 9-3
failures.failureSummary: Block 5 failure case referenced in the Falcon 9 / Falcon Heavy launch list.

failures.name: Starship Flight 6
failures.failureSummary: Booster catch attempt aborted; booster performed controlled splashdown in Gulf of Mexico. Ship completed successful controlled splashdown in Indian Ocean.

failures.name: Starship Flight 8
failures.failureSummary: Ship lost after premature engine shutdowns during ascent; booster was successfully caught.

failures.name: Starship Flight 9
failures.failureSummary: Booster was lost before splashdown and ship was lost after payload-door / propellant issues.

failures.name: Starship Flight 10
failures.failureSummary: Booster splashdown in Gulf after engine issues prevented catch attempt. Ship survived reentry despite aft engine bay explosion but broke up on splashdown.
